description.en: Sets or resets the time zone search path (TZPATH) for the module. When called with no arguments, TZPATH is set to the default value. Calling reset_tzpath will not invalidate the ZoneInfo cache, and so calls to the primary ZoneInfo constructor will only use the new TZPATH in the case of a cache miss. The to parameter must be a sequence of strings or os.PathLike and not a string, all of which must be absolute paths. ValueError will be raised if something other than an absolute path is passed.
